summary: Post-Launch-Branch flow testing completed. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: (1) StoryViewerPage shows Battle Status Banner with 'Your version is LIVE' for branch jobs, (2) Leaderboard button present and functional, (3) Engagement row (Like, Save, Share) present, (4) Make Your Version CTA with 'Put your own spin' subtext present. ContinuationModal code verified: shows 'Entering battle...' during loading, fires 'You've entered the battle!' toast, tracks cta_clicked with type='launch_branch'. StoryVideoPipeline code verified: Battle Entry Banner renders for continuation_type='branch', auto-redirects to Watch Page 3s after READY state.
critical_code_review_comments: ContinuationModal.jsx (line 245): Correctly shows 'Entering battle...' for branch mode during loading
ContinuationModal.jsx (line 104): Correctly fires toast 'You've entered the battle! Your version is generating...'
ContinuationModal.jsx (lines 92-100): Correctly tracks cta_clicked event with type='launch_branch'
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2107-2144): Battle Entry Banner correctly renders when job.continuation_type === 'branch'
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2129-2136): Leaderboard link correctly uses job.root_story_id
StoryVideoPipeline.js (line 2142): 'Saved to MySpace' note present in Battle Entry Banner
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2172-2193): Branch completion panel shows 'Your version is LIVE!' with Watch/Leaderboard buttons
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 1881-1887): Auto-redirect to Watch Page 3s after branch reaches READY state
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 309-337): Battle Status Banner correctly renders for continuation_type === 'branch'
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 339-375): Engagement row with Like, Save, Share buttons present
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 446-464): Make Your Version CTA with 'Put your own spin on this story' subtext
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (battle-demo-root, battle-demo-br1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-Launch-Branch flow verified. Key test jobs: (1) battle-demo-root (continuation_type=original, root story), (2) battle-demo-br1 (continuation_type=branch, root_story_id=battle-demo-root, state=READY). StoryViewerPage correctly shows Battle Status Banner for branch jobs. ContinuationModal correctly shows 'Entering battle...' loading state and fires 'You've entered the battle!' toast. StoryVideoPipeline auto-redirects branch jobs to Watch Page 3s after READY. Note: Pipeline page requires job ownership - test user cannot view battle-demo-br1 on pipeline page (owned by UAT Test User), but can view it on StoryViewerPage.
